name: Google Drive API
description: Google Drive REST API v3 for searching files, uploading and downloading content, managing permissions, and tracking changes across My Drive and shared drives.
pricing: Drive API is quota-limited shared infrastructure. Docs list 12,000 queries per 60 seconds (project) and 12,000 per 60 seconds per user, with no daily request cap if per-minute limits are respected: https://developers.google.com/workspace/drive/api/guides/limits
